summary: 38 analysts consensus Buy rating as of April 29, 2026. No recent downgrades. Last upgrade: HSBC raised PT to $320 on Oct 15, 2025. Most recent action: Benchmark reiterated Buy with $250 PT on Mar 31, 2026. 94% of analysts have Buy rating. No downgrades in 2026 so far.
